calendar.matters:
UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-18-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-18-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: A. Mok. Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Brian Skarbek, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Essex Fox Plaza, L.P.
Witness Eesha Kaur sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Douglas Boggs.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-5 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1390 Market Street, Apartment #1404, San Francisco, California 94102.

Damages $6733.94
Holdover damages $0
Attorney's Fees $1400.00
Costs $365.00
For a Total Judgment of $8498.94

Judgment signed in open court.
